summary: Successfully tested React Select component fixes in Global Access Shipping website. All Select components are now working correctly without React errors. Driver Select, Status Update Select, and form submission flows are fully functional.
passed_tests: Create shipment form - Driver Select component works correctly
Driver Select dropdown opens and displays options (No driver assigned, Test Driver 171401, Test Driver 171432)
Driver Select allows selection of 'No driver assigned' option without errors
Form submission successful with Driver Select component
Shipment detail page - Status Update dialog opens correctly
Status Update Select component displays all status options (Pending, Picked Up, In Transit, Out for Delivery, Delivered, Failed Delivery)
Status Update Select allows option selection without React errors
Status Update dialog form fields (Location, Notes) work correctly
No React Select component errors encountered during testing
All Select component fixes functioning correctly
